mapper.insert: insert into leader_profiles (account_id, intro, years_of_exp, base_region_code, total_rating, rating_count) values (#{accountId}, #{intro}, #{yearsOfExp}, #{baseRegionCode}, #{totalRating}, #{ratingCount})
mapper.update: update leader_profiles set intro = #{intro}, years_of_exp = #{yearsOfExp}, base_region_code = #{baseRegionCode}, total_rating = #{totalRating}, rating_count = #{ratingCount} where account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: select account_id, intro, years_of_exp, base_region_code, total_rating, rating_count from leader_profiles
